Generate a template CSV based on the help-center's languages

get.description:
List help centers.

If authenticated as agent, returns the list of help centers associated with the account domain
the agent belongs to.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of resources to retrieve per request. E.g: 20

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The index of the page to retrieve. E.g: 3

get.summary: Get account information for a help center
get.description: When both subdomain and custom_domain are provided, the subdomain will be used to search the help center

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of resources to retrieve per request. E.g: 20

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The index of the page to retrieve. E.g: 3

put.description: If the provided `id`s is missing an item, this item will be sorted last.

parameters.name: locale_fallback
parameters.description:
When true, if the translation for the requested
    `locale` can't be found, the response will include a fallback translation.

    If the requested resource exists in help center's default locale, that's the
    one that'll be returned. Otherwise the first available translation will be returned.

    The response will include the property `locale_fallback` that gives details
    on how the fallback was chosen.

    translation, you can't delete a translation if it's the only
    non-deleted translation.

file_url.description: Configuration for importing the CSV file.
Configuration for analysing the CSV file.

token.description: Session token generated for hotswap widget

session_id.description: Session id generated by hotswap service

subdomain.description:
A valid subdomain for the Help center.

Should be:
- length no greater than 63
- must begin and end with an alpha-numeric
- may contain hyphens (dashes)
- may not begin or end with a hyphen

If not provided, a subdomain will be generated.

search_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if search feature is deactivated for this Help center.

self_service_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if self service is deactivated for this Help center.

per_page.description: The number of items returned in this response.

current_page.description: The path to the current page.

nb_pages.description: The number of pages in this pagination.

next_page.description:
The path to the next page.

If none, there is no next page.

subdomain.description:
A valid subdomain for the Help center.

Should be:
- length no greater than 63
- must begin and end with an alpha-numeric
- may contain hyphens (dashes)
- may not begin or end with a hyphen

If not provided, a subdomain will be generated.

search_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if search feature is deactivated for this Help center.

self_service_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if self service is deactivated for this Help center.

powered_by_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if "Powered By Gorgias" will be displayed in this help center footer

deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the help center is deactivated.

account_id.description: The account id whose help centers should be deleted

title.description: The content of the `<title />` HTML tag for the help center translation.

description.description: The content of the `<meta name="description">` HTML tag for the help center translation.

locale.description:
The locale of the translation.

It should be in help center's supported locales.

seo_meta.description: The SEO meta attributes of the help center in the `locale`'s translation.

extra_head.description:
The HTML injected in the head

It should be in help center's supported locales.

extra_head_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the extra head should be injected.

custom_header.description:
The HTML of the custom header

It should be in help center's supported locales.

custom_header_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the custom header should be injected.

custom_footer.description:
The HTML of the custom footer

It should be in help center's supported locales.

custom_footer_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the custom footer should be injected.

seo_meta.description: The SEO meta attributes of the help center in the `locale`'s translation.

banner_text.description: The banner text of the help center in the `locale`'s translation.

status.description:
The status of this custom domain:
- `active`: the custom domain is validated and working
- `pending`: the custom domain is pending validation
- `unknown`: the custom domain is in an unknown status, check `verification_errors`
to know more.

extra_head.description:
The HTML injected in the head

It should be in help center's supported locales.

extra_head_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the extra head should be injected.

custom_header.description:
The HTML of the custom header

It should be in help center's supported locales.

custom_header_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the custom header should be injected.

custom_footer.description:
The HTML of the custom footer

It should be in help center's supported locales.

custom_footer_deactivated.description: Boolean indicating if the custom footer should be injected.

title.description: The content of the `<title />` HTML tag for the category translation.

description.description: The content of the `<meta name="description">` HTML tag for the category translation.

locale.description:
The locale of the translation.

It should be in help center's supported locales.

title.description: The title of the category in the `locale`'s translation.

description.description: The description of the category in the `locale`'s translation.

slug.description:
A slug for the category that'll be used to construct category's URLs.

Should only contains alphanumeric values and hyphens.

seo_meta.description: The SEO meta attributes of the category in the `locale`'s translation.

translation.description:
A translation for the category.

When creating a category, a translation should be provided.

locale_fallback.description:
Gives details on how the translation fallback was chosen:
- `undefined`: the translation is the requested one
- `default`: the translation is in help center's default locale
- `available`: the translation corresponds to the first available one

description.description: The description of the category in the `locale`'s translation.

slug.description:

seo_meta.description: The SEO meta attributes of the category in the `locale`'s translation.

locale_fallback.description:
Gives details on how the translation fallback was chosen:
- `undefined`: the translation is the requested one
- `default`: the translation is in help center's default locale
- `available`: the translation corresponds to the first available one

positionInCategory.description:
The position of the article in its category.
If the article has no category, it'll be the position of
the articles among uncategorized articles.

title.description: The content of the `<title />` HTML tag for the article translation.

description.description: The content of the `<meta name="description">` HTML tag for the article translation.

locale.description:
The locale of the translation.

It should be in help center's supported locales.

title.description: The title of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

excerpt.description: The excerpt of the article in the `locale`'s translation.
excerpt.example: Explains how to cancel an order

content.description:
The content of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

Supports HTML formatted content.

slug.description:
A slug for the article that'll be used to construct article's URLs.

Should only contains alphanumeric values and hyphens.

seo_meta.description: The SEO meta attributes of the article in the `locale`'s translation.

translation.description:
A translation for the article.

When creating an article, a translation should be provided.

excerpt.description: The excerpt of the article in the `locale`'s translation.
excerpt.example: Explains how to cancel an order

slug.description:

rating.description: The rating of the article translation.

label.description: The label of the navigation link.
